maestro_root_hint: Set MAESTRO_ROOT or pass --maestro-root to point at your local maestro-v3.0.0 folder.

chopin_nocturne_op9_no2.title: Nocturne Op. 9 No. 2 in E-flat Major
chopin_nocturne_op9_no2.description: Lyrical and spacious. Good first demo for hearing whether the model can keep a singing melody while changing intensity.

beethoven_tempest_i.title: Sonata No. 17 in D Minor, Op. 31 No. 2, First Movement
beethoven_tempest_i.description: More dramatic and rhythmically charged. Good stress test for whether the edit remains coherent when intensity changes sharply.

mozart_k330_i.title: Sonata in C Major, K. 330, I. Allegro moderato
mozart_k330_i.description: Clean classical phrasing with less pedal density. Useful for hearing articulation changes under different intensity levels.

grieg_waltz_op12_no2.title: Lyric Piece in A Minor, Waltz, Op. 12 No. 2
grieg_waltz_op12_no2.description: Short and compact. Good fastest smoke test when you want to check the whole pipeline quickly.
